---
title: "Reading notes"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [date, title, categories, description]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Date read"
    title: "Paper"
    categories: "Tags"
    description: "One-line takeaway"
---

Protocol-adjacent papers worth annotating in depth.
Not every paper — just the ones that directly inform how you run an experiment
or interpret a result.
